creator: groenveld@acm.org
text:
plasma6 with wayland is working but my log file includes this noise:

kpipewire_logging: error: "Failed to connect to PipeWire" 0
received error while creating the stream "Failed to connect to PipeWire" Media m
onitor will not work.


Audio is working.

$ uname -srv
FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT #0 main-n272752-d5e9faf1f329: Thu Oct 10 03:53:59 UTC 2024     root@releng3.nyi.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC
$ pkg info |grep plasma6-kpipe
plasma6-kpipewire-6.1.2        Components relating to Flatpak 'pipewire' use in Plasma

I'm invoking plasma like so...
$ dbus-launch ck-launch-session startplasma-wayland

Many thanks to the KDE porters for moving the ball forward.
John
groenveld@acm.org
